title: 1pc Bone Wrench Multi-Functional Bicycle Tool, 10 in 1 Hex Bone Wrench for 6-15mm, Portable Dog Bone Style Socket Wrench for Fast Bike Repairs, Easy Maintenance and Outdoor Cycling Use
features: Multi-Function Wrench: This bone wrench combines 10 hexagon sizes from 6mm to 15mm in one piece. It helps cyclists adjust parts quickly, reducing the need for multiple tools during regular maintenance or urgent roadside repairs

Portable Socket Design: The dog bone style socket wrench provides a steady hold for tightening or loosening bolts. Its structure allows smooth movement and easy control, supporting fast adjustments on pedals, cranks, or other bike areas

Wide Range Application: This dog bone hexagon spanner can replace multiple single-use spanners and pedal tools. It fits bicycles, scooters, and light mechanical tasks, giving riders a practical and versatile solution for everyday maintenance needs

Cycling-Friendly Size: As a hex bone wrench 10 in 1, it is light enough to carry in a pocket or seat pack. Riders can keep it close for unexpected roadside issues, ensuring smooth outdoor trips with quick access to different hex sizes

Reliable Repair Helper: Designed as a bicycle repair wrench tool, it makes bolt handling more efficient. Clear hexagon holes match bolts well, keeping from slipping and saving time. It is practical for both routine care and on-the-go bike servicing
description: Product Overview This 1-piece multifunctional wrench merges portability with wide utility. Acting as a dog bone hexagon spanner, it has 10 hexagon holes from 6mm to 15mm for common bike repair needs. Easy to store and carry, it handles quick pedal adjustments, crank arm fixes, and other fittings. The tool also serves as a general spanner for scooters, motorcycles, or household tasks, cutting the need for multiple tools. Its bone-shaped design ensures a comfortable grip and secure bolt engagement, saving time by reducing slips. Built for both everyday upkeep and unexpected repairs, this compact bike spanner wrench is a dependable tool for outdoor rides or home workshops. Multi-Use Tool In One Frame The dog bone style combines multiple functions in a single frame. With hexagon holes from 6mm to 15mm, it replaces several wrenches for pedals, crank arms, and other bicycle adjustments. Compact And Portable Size Lightweight and easy to carry, this tool fits in a pocket, backpack, or bike pouch. Riders can take it anywhere, ready for quick fixes at home, on the road, or during outdoor rides. Versatile Applications Beyond cycling, it works as a spanner for scooters, motorcycles, or household repairs. Its multi-functional design reduces the need to carry separate socket wrench tools. User-Friendly Shape The bone-shaped allen wrench offers ergonomic handling with a balanced structure. Each hexagon hole is shaped for smooth bolt engagement, improving grip and reducing slips. Reliable Cycling Companion As a hexagon hole spanner for bicycles, this tool supports efficient tightening, loosening, and adjusting, helping keep bikes in good condition for regular maintenance.
